programmes.show_description: Dotun Adebayo with your calls and discussion through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
With a two-week ceasefire in place, Sean Farrington finds out what it will take for the flow of oil to be restored in the Strait of Hormuz.
Rachel Burden and Rick Edwards present with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Nicky Campbell takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles with original journalism and surprising news stories. Join the conversation, text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Nick Eardley brings you big political guests, the key news of the day, and your views on the issues that matter to you. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Chris Warburton and Sarah Mulkerrins. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Mark Chapman presents live from Augusta with the day's sports news, the latest from The Masters plus build-up to Bologna v Aston Villa in the Europa League.
Live football commentary of Bologna v Aston Villa in the Europa League quarter-final.
Tony Livesey with late night conversation, the stories that matter to you, and in-depth interviews. Join the conversation, text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
News and insight from the business world. Download the podcast via the BBC Sounds app.
Steffan Powell and Rima Ahmed present with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Tony Livesey takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles gets you set for the weekend with a good-humoured look at the latest news, sport and entertainment. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
It's a big/normal day! Everything in Elis and John world just got bigger/stayed exactly the same as before! All praise the Brave New World/status quo!
Qasa Alom brings you big political guests, the key news of the day, and your views on the issues that matter to you. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Chris Warburton and Sarah Mulkerrins. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Mark Chapman is live from Augusta with the latest news and analysis from this year's Masters Tournament, plus updates on West Ham v Wolves in the Premier League.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
